title: Hessenuk: Vanilla Edition
description: Optimized 1.21.5 client-side modpack for playing on vanilla servers or going on a quality single-player adventure.
body:
Enjoy an enhanced vanilla 1.21.5 experience, with higher performance, better graphics and quality of life features across the board.

## Pack includes

- Common optimization mods
- New sounds and ambience
- Modern graphics improvements
- Mini map and world map for navigation

A full list of mods included in the modpack is available in the dependencies tab of each specific modpack's version.
